basic_info.name_zh: 好邻居（韩国国际人道主义发展NGO）

digital_assets.name: Good Neighbors Global Impact Foundation
digital_assets.description: Social enterprise and cooperative support arm

digital_assets.name: Good Neighbors Global Partnership Center (USA)
digital_assets.description: US-based global policy and partnership arm

key_people.name: 양진옥 (Yang Jin-ok)
key_people.title: Chairman / 회장
key_people.title_description: Head of Good Neighbors Korea since 2016; first female chair
key_people.description: Joined Good Neighbors in 1995 as the first public recruitment cohort; graduated from Chung-Ang University Department of Social Welfare; previously served as Secretary-General before becoming Chairman at age 45

key_people.name: 이일하 (Yi Il-ha)
key_people.title: Chairman of the Board / 이사장
key_people.title_description: Founder and former Chairman; now serves as Board Chairman
key_people.description: Founded Good Neighbors on March 28, 1991 with 7 founding members; stepped down as Chairman in 2016 at age 69, transitioning to Board Chairman role

key_people.name: 정해원 (Jeong Hae-won)
key_people.title: Representative Director, Good Neighbors Global Impact Foundation / 총대이사
key_people.title_description: Heads the social enterprise arm of Good Neighbors
key_people.description: Also serves as registered director on the main board

key_people.name: 김웅철 (Kim Ung-cheol)
key_people.title: Secretary-General, Social Welfare Corp. Good Neighbors / 사무총장
key_people.description: Oversees domestic child protection and community welfare programs

key_people.name: 전미선 (Jeon Mi-seon)
key_people.title: Secretary-General / 사무총장
key_people.title_description: Chief administrative officer of Good Neighbors International
key_people.description: Leads day-to-day operations of the international development arm

departments.name: International Cooperation Division / 국제협력실
departments.head: 박해성
departments.description: Oversees all overseas development projects in 42+ countries including education, health, water sanitation, and income generation programs

departments.name: Domestic Operations Division / 국내사업본부
departments.head: 권민정
departments.description: Manages domestic child abuse prevention, at-risk family support, child health programs, and community welfare services

departments.name: Fundraising & Marketing Division / 나눔마케팅본부
departments.head: 이태헌
departments.description: Handles donor acquisition, retention campaigns, and public engagement including the Your Turn campaign

departments.name: ESG & Social Contribution Division / ESG사회공헌협력실
departments.head: 어정욱
departments.description: Manages corporate partnerships, ESG-related collaborations, and corporate social responsibility programs

departments.name: Future Policy Division / 미래정책실
departments.head: 최형미
departments.description: Strategic planning, policy research, and future-oriented program development

recent_events.title: Good Neighbors Day at Changwon NC Park
recent_events.description: Good Neighbors hosts its annual Good Neighbors Day baseball event on May 9-10, 2026 at Changwon NC Park, combining public awareness with fundraising activities.
recent_events.impact: Annual flagship public engagement and donor recruitment event

recent_events.title: Good Neighbors Global Impact FY2024 External Audit Report Published
recent_events.description: The 2024 external audit report for Good Neighbors Global Impact Foundation was published, confirming transparent financial management of social enterprise operations.
recent_events.impact: Reinforces 10-year consecutive transparency rating from Korea GuideStar

recent_events.title: 2024 Annual Report Released
recent_events.description: Good Neighbors released its 2024 annual report covering operations across 51+ countries, highlighting humanitarian assistance reaching over 500,000 beneficiaries through the Global Partnership Center alone.
recent_events.impact: Demonstrates continued expansion of global operations and donor base growth

recent_events.title: Good Neighbors ranks #1 in donation revenue among Korea's Big 5 fundraising NGOs
recent_events.description: In 2024, Good Neighbors recorded 3,095 billion KRW in total donation revenue, surpassing World Vision for the first time to become the top fundraising NGO in South Korea. Individual donations reached approximately 935 billion KRW.
recent_events.impact: Major milestone marking Good Neighbors as Korea's largest fundraising NGO by donation revenue

related_entities.org_description: Korean government aid agency; partnered with Good Neighbors on Cambodia maternal health program

related_entities.org_name: United Nations Economic and Social Council (UN ECOSOC)
related_entities.org_description: Good Neighbors granted General Consultative Status since 1996, the first Korean NGO to achieve this
Official partner since 2011 for food security programs
Partnership for refugee assistance programs globally
Canadian fundraising and advocacy affiliate, registered with Canada Revenue Agency in 2023
US fundraising affiliate with 15+ years of operations

core_business: Good Neighbors（굿네이버스）是1991年3月28日在韩国成立的国际人道主义发展非政府组织，总部位于首尔永登浦区。其前身为「韩国邻居爱心会」（한국이웃사랑회），2002年更名为Good Neighbors。该组织以「消除饥饿的世界，共同生活的世界」为愿景，以联合国儿童权利公约（CRC）和可持续发展目标（SDGs）为基础，在全球51个以上国家开展国际开发合作和国内专业社会福利事业。核心业务涵盖：（1）海外地区开发——教育保护、保健医疗、饮用水卫生、收入增长、权利倡导及人道主义紧急救援；（2）国内专业福利——儿童虐待预防与保护、危机家庭支持、儿童健康、自立准备青年支持、儿童权利倡导；（3）世界公民教育及募款活动。该组织是韩国首个获得联合国经社理事会（UN ECOSOC）全面协商地位的非政府组织（1996年），也是联合国世界粮食计划署（WFP）的官方合作伙伴（2011年起）。2024年捐赠收入达3,095亿韩元，首次超越世界宣明会成为韩国募款额最大的非政府组织，在韩国5大募款机构中排名第一。运营Three Principles（专业性、透明性、持续性）和Safe Guarding Policy，连续10年获韩国GuideStar综合评价满分。
apec_stance: Good Neighbors作为韩国规模最大的国际人道主义发展NGO，在APEC经济体中拥有广泛的业务覆盖，包括东南亚（越南、柬埔寨、菲律宾、缅甸、印度尼西亚）、东亚（蒙古）、南美（智利）等APEC成员国家和地区。该组织通过社区发展项目、紧急救援和儿童权利保护，间接促进了APEC区域内的人力资源开发和社会可持续发展。与KOICA等政府机构以及UN WFP、UNHCR等国际组织的合作，使其在亚太地区发展合作领域具有政策影响力。

collection_meta.notes: Enriched from skeleton profile. Fixed critical errors: name_zh corrected from drama title '鄰居萬歲' to accurate Chinese description; website corrected from TBS Japan TV page to actual goodneighbors.kr. Key financial data sourced from 2024 Big 5 NGO comparison analysis and GPC FY2024 audit report (total GN Korea revenue ~71.6B KRW). Organization structure sourced from official corporation page. Founder Yi Il-ha stepped down as Chairman in 2016; Yang Jin-ok succeeded as first female chair.
